featureDetection.rationale: Renders a support probe checking if Chrome 138+ attribute escaping behavior is active, adjusting user messages accordingly.

gracefulFallback.rationale: Provides fully functional recreated pre-138 escaping side-by-side, ensuring the core demo is useful on any browser.

genuineInteraction.rationale: Allows live user typing inputs to instantly compare outerHTML serialization output in real-time.

builderMultipleDemos.rationale: Part of a comprehensive set of 4 interactive concepts deep-diving into outerHTML serialization behavior.

designSystemContrast.rationale: Strictly uses design system CSS variables with excellent contrast and mobile compatibility.

references.rationale: Successfully links to the required chromestatus.com/feature/6264983847174144 reference.
